inbound.message: Do you have anything for an office of 12 people for Friday morning?

outbound.message:
Hi Maya — yes, our Office dessert box is made for this. $120, assorted desserts, comfortable for a 12-person office. Friday morning pickup is open; want me to hold a slot?
Order on the site at happycake.us or send a message on WhatsApp.
— Saule

Hi! 3 Office dessert boxes for Monday — yes we can. $360 total. Want me to hold a slot? Need pickup time and a phone number for confirmations.
Order on the site at happycake.us or send a message on WhatsApp.
— Saule
Hi! Yes the Office dessert box is $120 and we have Friday slots open. — Saule
Welcome back — happy to hold a whole cake "Honey" for Saturday. — Saule
